'''Eriadu''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Eriadu system/Legends|Eriadu system]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by six [[Planet/Legends|planets]].<ref name="GatORW" />

{{Star-stub}}
